_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

validations.logic: Notification event_code must exist in event_catalog.
Notification events and deliveries must have idempotency keys to avoid duplicate sends.
Delivery requires active template for event_code + channel + locale.
Template variables must be fully available before rendering.
Recipients are resolved server-side; client-supplied recipient list is ignored except admin test-send under policy.
School coordinator sees only own in-app notification deliveries.
Provider API keys/secrets never reach browser.
Provider webhook status updates require verified signature when provider supports it.
Notification payloads must not include raw OMR data, answer keys, provider secrets or private file URLs.
Public role cannot read notification_events or notification_deliveries.
Delivery retries must stop at configured max_retry_count.
Only approved/active templates can be used for real delivery.
